creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
> Initial review:
> 
>  * MAINTAINER: portmaster@FreeBSD.org - incorrect domain
>  * Add LICENSE_FILE if a standalone license file exists in distribution files

P.S. I chose LICENSE, over LICENSE_FILE(s), because in this
version -- 3.5.4, COPYING (included in the source tarball), is
an exact copy of GPLv2. So [to me, anyway] it seemed the
same. No?

Thanks again, Kubilay.

--Chris
